attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.ADJUSTMENT_PERIOD_FLAG, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.APPLICATION_ID, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE1, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE2, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE3, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE4, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.ATTRIBUTE5, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.CHRONOLOGICAL_SEQ_STATUS_CODE, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.CLOSING_STATUS, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.CONTEXT, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.CREATED_BY, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.CREATION_DATE, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.EFFECTIVE_PERIOD_NUM, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.ELIMINATION_CONFIRMED_FLAG, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.END_DATE, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.GES_UPDATE_DATE, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.GLOBAL_NAME, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.PERIOD_NAME, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.PERIOD_NUM, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.PERIOD_TYPE, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.PERIOD_YEAR, MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.QUARTER_NUM, to_date('01/01/1900 01:01:01','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')  QUARTER_START_DATE, 
CASE WHEN GLOBAL_NAME='US' THEN MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
WHEN GLOBAL_NAME='BE' THEN MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.LEDGER_ID 
END AS SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, 
MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES.START_DATE, 
to_date('01/01/1900 01:01:01','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')   YEAR_START_DATE 
FROM
MF_GL_PERIOD_STATUSES
WHERE   GES_UPDATE_DATE> to_date('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
